name: Close affinity — diasporic religion
description: Sanity check: three books with clear thematic affinity around African diasporic religious traditions
notes: Fill book_ids after enrichment. These should produce strong, specific questions.

name: Cross-domain — fiction, photography, religion
description: Harder thread: novel + photography + religious art
notes: Should hold tension between lineages rather than collapsing.

name: Fashion monographs cluster
description: Three fashion monographs — thinner but real questions expected
notes: Select three after reviewing enriched data for fashion-related books.

name: Deliberately disparate
description: One photography + one fashion + one Black history book
notes: Most challenging for the prompt. Questions should not default to 'identity'.

name: Same author — Toni Morrison
description: Three Toni Morrison books — should produce three distinct readings, not near-duplicates
notes: Select three Morrison titles from catalog.

name: Photography cluster
description: Three photography books to test visual-art-specific question quality

name: Music and performance
description: Books about music, performance, or sonic culture

name: Pair only — two books
notes: Verify questions still work with only 2 inputs.
